notes: 3.11.10 — MO KHOA AUTO SNAPSHOT CLEANUP tren may write-cutover (Sep duyet; su co quota admin 96.9%): DK3 (precutover_fail===0) la dieu kien gac LOI THOI voi role da write-cutover — role nay ghi state CHI vao IDB, localStorage la tan du khong cap nhat → hash IDB≠LS TAT YEU dung thiet ke (duong doc da bo qua precutover tu Phase 2b), counter fail lich su chan cleanup VINH VIEN.
